summary:
I located the issue in `Scheduler._is_due`: it only checked the event’s scheduled time using the UTC date, so events near midnight (or around DST changes) could be missed. I updated the function so it:

- Converts the window’s start and end times into the event’s local timezone.
- Considers both local dates spanning the window.
- Handles ambiguous/non-existent times around DST transitions.

This ensures late-night events fire correctly. I reran `test.sh` and all tests pass.
